overview: Government Engineering College Kosgi (GEC Kosgi), established in 2024, is a state-funded technical institution located in the Narayanpet district of Telangana. It was founded to provide accessible, high-quality engineering education to students in rural and semi-urban areas. The college currently focuses on modern computing branches and shares premises with the Government Polytechnic Kosgi, utilizing a combined infrastructure to support its early-stage growth.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad (JNTUH).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics + TG EAPCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics + TG EAPCET rank
10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics + TG EAPCET rank

placements.avgSalary: Data Pending (First B.Tech batch yet to graduate)

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TGCHE) web counseling process. Seats are allotted based on merit ranks in TG EAPCET for B.Tech and TG POLYCET for Diploma courses. 100% of seats are filled under the Convener Quota (Government Quota).
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET 2026: May 9–11, 2026; Results: May 2026; Counseling: July 2026; TG POLYCET: May 2026.

facilities: Computing Laboratories for AI/ML and Data Science
Central Library with Academic Book Bank
Separate Hostel Facilities for Boys and Girls
campus.specialNote: Being a newly established B.Tech institution (2024), GEC Kosgi is currently scaling its infrastructure. It operates with a strong focus on 'Emerging Technologies' and benefits from government-subsidized fee structures and state-run scholarship programs like RTF (Reimbursement of Tuition Fee).

contact.address: Government Engineering College Campus, Kosgi, Narayanpet District, Telangana - 509339
